summary: Cavallo hoof boots feature easy Velcro and buckle straps that riders with arthritic or stiff hands find simple to apply and remove, with rider testimonials.
Interview with Barcelona veterinarian Jessica Madueno about transitioning her young P.R.E. horse Castuo to barefoot using Cavallo Trek hoof boots.
Cavallo offers three free downloadable PDF hoof-care books (Hoof Prints on the Journey, There Are No Horseshoes in Heaven, Barefoot Trim Guide) as a 2021 holiday gift.
Cost-saving barefoot hoof-care and booting plan advice for new young horse owners transitioning from full-care barns, answering a reader question.
Eight surprising uses for Cavallo hoof boots, including hoof rehabilitation, turnout, soaking treatments, and injury protection.
Honey's Mini Therapy Adventures uses Cavallo CLB boots on miniature horses for safe footing during hospital, care home, and school therapy visits in Florida.
Barrel racer Susie Busse uses Cavallo Trek boots to keep her rodeo and pole-bending horses comfortable and slip-free during trailer travel to Midwest events.
July 2022 Cavallo News covering founder's Enterprising Women of the Year award, her barrel-racing past, and team updates.
August 2022 Cavallo News spotlighting sizing expert Yvonne, a lifelong horsewoman and founder of The Horse's Hoof Magazine, and her barefoot-care expertise.
Cavallo hoof boots help thin-soled horses by protecting and padding soles for immediate comfort, with trail rider testimonials about results.
First video in Cavallo's Laminitis series explaining what laminitis and founder are and how they affect a horse's hoof, based on Equine Affaire talks.
Cavallo Trek boots support barefoot dressage horses at Olympic level, featuring two-time Canadian Olympian Jacqueline Brooks protecting her horses on gravel showgrounds.
